Class ChildStage

java.lang.Object
simcli.entities.lifecycle.ChildStage
All Implemented Interfaces:
LifeStage
public class ChildStage extends Object implements LifeStage
Life stage for Sims aged 0–12. Children cannot work and have faster energy decay (1.5x). Transitions to TeenStage when the Sim reaches age 13.

  • Constructor Details

    • ChildStage

      public ChildStage()

  • Method Details

    • canWork

      public boolean canWork()
      Returns whether a Sim in this life stage is allowed to work.
      Specified by:
      canWork in interface LifeStage
      Returns:
      false — children cannot work.

    • getEnergyDecayModifier

      public double getEnergyDecayModifier()
      Returns the energy decay modifier for this life stage. Values below 1.0 slow decay; values above 1.0 accelerate it.
      Specified by:
      getEnergyDecayModifier in interface LifeStage
      Returns:
      1.5x — accelerated energy decay for children.

    • getStageName

      public String getStageName()
      Returns the human-readable name of this stage (e.g. "Child", "Adult").
      Specified by:
      getStageName in interface LifeStage
      Returns:
      "Child".

    • getNextStage

      public LifeStage getNextStage(int currentAge)
      Determines whether a transition to the next life stage should occur based on the Sim's current age. Transitions to TeenStage at age 13.
      Specified by:
      getNextStage in interface LifeStage
      Parameters:
      currentAge - the Sim's current age after the latest birthday.
      Returns:
      a new LifeStage instance if a transition occurs, or this if the Sim stays in the current stage.
